display.purpose: Fixed 3rem desktop and 2.125rem mobile route titles.

compact.purpose: Navigation, metadata, and dense product UI at 0.875rem.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and disclosure state feedback.

components.name: Active Navigation Link
components.description: Quiet current-location treatment shared by header and sidebar navigation.
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 6px; border-radius: 4.8px; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--shell-accent) 10%, transparent); color: var(--shell-accent-strong); font: 700 0.92rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-active:hover { color: var(--shell-accent-strong); } .ds-nav-active:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--shell-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Code Panel
components.description: Structural technical container with a compact title rail.
components.css: .ds-code-panel { overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--shell-border); border-radius: 8px; background: var(--shell-code); color: var(--shell-text); } .ds-code-title { padding: 9px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--shell-border); color: var(--shell-muted); font: 700 0.78rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-code-panel pre { margin: 0; padding: 16px; overflow: auto; font: 0.92rem/1.6 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; } .ds-code-panel:focus-within { outline: 2px solid var(--shell-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Metadata Row
components.description: Dense lifecycle or provenance fact with clear label-value hierarchy.
components.css: .ds-meta { margin: 0; } .ds-meta div { display: grid; grid-template-columns: max-content minmax(0, 1fr); gap: 16px; align-items: center; padding: 9px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--shell-border); background: var(--shell-code); } .ds-meta dt { color: var(--shell-muted); font: 700 0.78rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-meta dd { margin: 0; color: var(--shell-text); font: 400 0.9rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: right; }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: Compact discovery input using the shell's structural border and focus signal.
components.html: <label class="ds-search-label" for="ds-search">Search components</label><input class="ds-search" id="ds-search" placeholder="Search components…" />
components.css: .ds-search-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; color: var(--shell-muted); font: 700 0.78rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-search { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; padding: 9px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--shell-border); border-radius: 6.4px; background: var(--shell-surface); color: var(--shell-text); font: 400 0.92rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search::placeholder { color: var(--shell-muted); opacity: 1; } .ds-search:hover { border-color: var(--shell-muted); } .ds-search:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--shell-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Preview Surface
components.description: Isolated origin-compatible canvas for live component examples.
components.css: .ds-preview { display: grid; min-height: 240px; place-items: center; padding: 16px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; background: #fff; color: #000; } .ds-preview button { padding: 8px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; background: #000; color: #fff; font: 500 0.875rem/1.4 Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-preview button:hover { background: #2b2b2b; } .ds-preview button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #737373; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Foldkit CN is a calm technical workspace: familiar enough for a shadcn user to navigate immediately, but explicit about the Foldkit architecture underneath every component. The shell is precise, pragmatic, and compact. Content, behavior, installability, and provenance carry the visual hierarchy; decoration does not. The system uses warm neutral surfaces and restrained teal emphasis to distinguish the documentation shell from the neutral shadcn-compatible preview canvas. It rejects a superficial shadcn reskin that merely renames source material or hides how each component was translated into Foldkit.
keyCharacteristics: Familiar documentation structure with a distinct Foldkit voice
Restrained teal reserved for navigation, focus, and meaningful action
Compact geometry, structural borders, and readable technical density
Clear separation between the Foldkit docs shell and component preview themes
Responsive navigation that preserves discovery and context

rules.name: The Restrained Signal Rule
rules.body: Teal identifies action, focus, selection, and Foldkit-specific emphasis; it is never ambient decoration.

rules.name: The Two-World Rule
rules.body: The documentation shell keeps the Foldkit palette while component previews preserve their origin-compatible tokens.

rules.name: The Technical Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Labels orient, headings structure, and body copy explains; never use label styling as decorative scaffolding.

rules.name: The Flat Workbench Rule
rules.body: Documentation content rests on the workbench; shadows appear only when an element actually floats above it.

dos: Do preserve shadcn's familiar discovery, preview, installation, usage, and API workflow.
Do make Foldkit architecture, conventions, examples, lifecycle, and provenance conspicuous.
Do reserve Workshop Teal and Deep Teal for interaction, focus, selection, and meaningful Foldkit emphasis.
Do keep prose readable, controls keyboard-operable, focus visible, and motion compatible with reduced-motion preferences.
Do keep docs-shell tokens separate from origin-compatible preview tokens.
donts: Don't create a superficial shadcn reskin that merely renames the source material or obscures how the component has been translated into Foldkit.
Don't apply shadcn site-level branding wholesale; familiar affordances are the structure, not the identity.
Don't turn every section into a bordered card or repeat tiny uppercase eyebrows as decorative scaffolding.
Don't pair a one-pixel border with a broad decorative shadow on the same static container.
Don't use teal as decoration, gradients on text, or glass effects as the default surface treatment.
